title: Podman in a Container
body:
### Feature request description

Many CI/CD environments need Docker in Docker (dind) at the moment, because many open source projects want to build their software in a container. dind is only available for arm and x86, because IBM and Red Hat want to see Podman used. But Podman does not exist equally in a container as dind is available.

We need an official Podman container image with Podman installed inside, which can be used by public open source projects in Github and Gitlab. 

### Suggest potential solution

1) Create a Containerfile/Dockerfile with an installed Podman, which can be used as a base container image for upstream open source projects in their pipelines.
2) Add an automated multi-arch build into the Podman CI/CD pipeline, so that this Podman container image will be updated automatically with every release and can be pushed automatically to different container registries (quay.io and Docker Hub as examples).

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Upstream open source projects have to use Docker with dind instead of Podman. ;-)

### Additional context

An example project using dind is Cilium. They create multi-arch container images with docker build in their dind container: https://github.com/cilium/image-tools/blob/49d7b282e76f941d6bf5abc4f125d14a1a7b2211/images/maker/Dockerfile#L11 (line 6)

comments.body:
https://github.com/containers/image_build/
We already publish container images for podman, buildah and skopeo there ready to be used and customised for the in container use case.
